code:
import collections

# List (O(1) operations: append (amortized), index access, index assignment, len)
my_list = []
my_list.append(1)
my_list.append(2)
my_list.append(3)
_ = my_list[0]
my_list[1] = 5
_ = len(my_list)

# Dictionary (O(1) operations: item assignment, item access, key existence, item deletion, len)
my_dict = {}
my_dict["a"] = 10
my_dict["b"] = 20
my_dict["c"] = 30
_ = my_dict["a"]
_ = "b" in my_dict
del my_dict["c"]
_ = len(my_dict)

# Set (O(1) operations: add, membership test, remove, len)
my_set = set()
my_set.add("x")
my_set.add("y")
my_set.add("z")
_ = "y" in my_set
my_set.remove("x")
_ = len(my_set)

# Deque (O(1) operations: append, appendleft, pop, popleft, len)
my_deque = collections.deque()
my_deque.append(100)
my_deque.appendleft(99)
my_deque.append(101)
_ = my_deque.popleft()
_ = my_deque.pop()
_ = len(my_deque)
